notes: At least 30 wealthy Norwegians (combined wealth ~29bn NOK) emigrated mainly to Switzerland in 2022 after the wealth-tax hike per Dagens Naeringsliv/FT. Includes Kjell Inge Roekke (moved to Lugano Sept 2022).
34 rich Norwegians emigrated in 2023 alone (Fortune citing Norways Finance Ministry + DN); cumulative 82 with combined net wealth ~46bn NOK left across 2022-2023
